channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 99 replies — 180.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:31 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61997405
100$ end of bull run

61997626
Just bought in, life savings. When does it hit $10?

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

62015928
>>62014587
Don't lie. Why do you think they call him WOOD? And he literally looks like a 7yo boy pedo, just look at him. If I googled "Pedophile" then Gavins picture would probably be #2, right after Epstein. And since we're talking about Epstein... Gavin and Epstein were partying all the time together.

62016012
>>62015928
Oh shit. You are a bot

62016043
>>62016012
Could a bot post pictures of his hands with a timestamp? Like I did here; >>62008295 ??? Makes no sense, right?

62016887
>>62016043
So are you for DOT or not

62016901
>>62016887
What do you mean by FOR? Could you define that a little bit more?

62016960
>>61932834
How does a thread with only 94 posts from 20 days ago exist? Dot fag must be bumping it everyday when it hits page 10.

62016999
>>62016960
Read this >>62007000
Also. This is now a DOT board. /biz/ was always a DOT board

62019865
100$ end of bull run

62019872
>>62019865
75

62020329
>>62019872
Dear Punjabista Rajakesh

We talked about this. I first write 100$ and then after it reaches the 9th page you bump the thread and you write 75$. Don't bump the thread before that or Gavin won't pay us DOT for shilling this project.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

item.title: TACO — 34 replies — 136.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TACO

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-03-23 12:01 UTC

OP

TACO
A
C
O

Early replies (first 3)

62020185
HAHAHA WHAT A FAGGOT. Iran has shown the entire world how do you deal with this evangelical wasps.

62020230
Taco Monday

62020233
>witch

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020256
>>62020178
on mondays we have tacos

62020257
>I AM PLEASE

62020269
YES GOYIM THERE ARE TOTALLY PEACE TALKS TRUST THE PLAN THERE WILL BE NO RECESSION!
DONALD J TRUMPENSTEIN

62020274
>>62020178
i hate this lying orange kike cocksucking faggot so much

62020283
>>62020178
>be billionaire
>get elected president
>can't afford spellcheck
>thinks this will distract from Epstein

62020305
>>62020178
So I'm supposed to believe that he declared total war and bombing of Iran in 48 hours WHILE those "in depth, detailed and constructive conversations" were going on? What the fuck is this

62020314
>>62020178
I can't believe oil dumps 10% because this retard tweets something
>t. my oil longs got liquidated

62020322
>>62020269
Kek. 100% the bombings will resume because Israel isnt backing out until it forces ground invasion. Theres already 8k marines over there, ready to invade the stupid island.

62020326
>>62020178
>friday - bomb everything!
>monday - we made peace the war is over!

62020327
>>62020257
>WITCH
this nigga literally never finished elementary school lmao

62020330
>>62020269
>5 day pause just in time for markets to close on Friday
We’re hitting new lows next Monday guaranteed.

62020345
>>62020283
>thinks this will distract from Epstein
the orange pedo let epstein write his tweets during his last presidency. compare covfefe to epsteins typical typo pattern.

62020349
right before the market opens, nobody saw this coming

62020351
Orange faggot is just lying. How are people falling for this?
I don't think he spoke to Iran at all. He might still attack on Friday (after the markets close)

62020353
>>62020330
>Markets close on friday
>FIRE AND BLOOK LIKE THE WORLD HAS NEVER SEEN. EPIC FURY. WINNING. WINNING. YOU THOUGHT WE ARE NOT WINNING? WRONG! MISTAKE. MISTAKE
>Monday morning
>Just kidding, bro

62020381
>>62020314
And now the Iranians, as always, confirm he's lying. There are no constructive talks.

62020387
After 4 a clock

>WE ARE GONNA DESTROY IRAN KILL MILLIONS


hours before before market opens

>Iran loves me

62020389
I'm selling everything, this isn't going back to normal just like that lol

62020398
how long before markets realize this guy is just doing price manipulation with total lies?

62020409
Don't Americans have any values? Can't they see what he is doing? Not even your Latin American president behaves like this

62020430
>>62020283
Trump is already fully exonerated. Meanwhile we still can find a single leftoid who isn't a pedo, Biden, Clinton, Hasan, desTINY, Vaush

62020435
>>62020398
The markets are obviously retarded, at least the big players. Or are just bots following the initial momentum of humans reacting to the news. Either way, it's tiresome.

62020440
>>62020409
As long as the libs get owned, it’s fine.

62020442
KEK BAGGIES IN HERE SEETHING
PANICANS BTFO

62020443
Somehow, white Americans are okay with this. Do they have any moral values left?

62020451
>>62020435
it's 100% algos

62020514
>>62020443
>morals
the only thing that matters is money

62020523
>>62020443
HE CAN'T KEEP GETTING AWAY WITH IT

62020541
>>62020451
it's not very hard to beat algos if you don't trade with emotions and can out patience them

62020595
>>62020541
as it's not very hard, you ARE posting this from your malibu mansion with a 50 car garage, RIGHT, anon?

item.title: Buy $1 worth of Ankh The blockchain it's built on (ankh.cash) was re-released, after the original 2006 abstract for it a… — 30 replies — 120.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Buy $1 worth of Ankh The blockchain it's built on (ankh.cash) was re-released, after the original 2006 abstract for it a…

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:51 UTC

OP

Buy $1 worth of Ankh

The blockchain it's built on (ankh.cash) was re-released, after the original 2006 abstract for it and all its web archive records were scrubbed in November 2025. Then on February 28 2026, right before the Iran - Israel war, it was made open source on Github.

It's a biometric blockchain that began verifying identities a few days later per the nodes and blockchain data.

After that, a sovereign token and sidechain was deployed on it named Republic of Adal in Somalia (registered website adal.so) in the region of the bab al mandab strait.

There's a dormant ETH bridge confirmed to be related to it as per ankh.cash. An interest group is carving out this nation and managing its finances on the blockchain and vying for a grip of power on the shipping lanes which has an increased value due to strait of hormuz.

The value of the mainnet Ankh is designed to be a stablecoin pegged to USD/USDT. Inevitably the price will have to go up to $1 on the contract address. The currency for the Republic of Adal will be on this chain.

There are converging mass verification events in parts of the developing world using this same blockchain. A shift is taking place in the global order - and a biometric based blockchain built on a UBI protocol is the perfect recipe for total control of finances, albeit in the developing world.

My theory is they are done with the developed world and are looking for new pawns to control. Everything is intentional and positioning for power. I believe the end goal is intentionally devaluing, or hedging against the devaluation, of the US dollar. There's a small window where the value will be convertible and the surest bet is through the ETH bridged contract. After that...

the final weaves of the webs of the new world order are woven.

Early replies (first 3)

62016547
>>62016543
GOOD MORNING SIR

62016554
>>62016547
I actually miss when this was all the board was. Just constant scams and shill attempts. You woke up and entered the /biz/ casino, knowing that even in the midst of all these scams you could probably make a buck and that if nothing else some fun memes were had from it.

62016564
Not schizoposting, this is really happening.

Check the node:

https://api.ankh.cash/api/v1/sidechains/adal-sovereign-1

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62016572
>>62016564
and here https://adal.so/ubi

62016620
okay, I’m interested. can you tell me more pls before jannies delete. how is this any different than all the other stuff over the years that has claimed to do the same and failed

62016626
>>62016543
I’ll bite. Where and how do I buy?

62016655
>>62016626
https://ankh.cash

I would highly suggest against doing the on chain verification because you'll have to submit biometrics.

The ETH version is the Genesis

62016680
>>62016655
Whys there a genesis sale for a blockchain like that

62016693
>>62016680
Astroturfing and kickbacks to insiders in the peripheries. Institutional volume comes in midway.

62016694
>>62016655
what kind of biometrics?

62016708
this screams jeetery
Domain Name: adal.so
Registry Domain ID: 312396-sonic
Registrar WHOIS Server: whois.namecheap.com
Updated Date: 2026-01-03T04:00:13Z
Creation Date: 2025-12-29T01:02:19Z
Registry Expiry Date: 2026-12-29T01:02:20Z
Registrar Registration Expiration Date: 2026-12-29T01:02:20Z
Registrar: NameCheap
Registrar IANA ID: 1068
Registrar Street Address: Street No. 4600, East Washington Street, Suite 305
Registrar City: Phoenix
Registrar State: AZ
Registrar Postal Code: 85034
Registrar Email: email@namecheap.com
Registrar Abuse Contact Email: email@namecheap.com
Registrar Abuse Contact Phone: +1.6613102107
Domain Status: active https://icann.org/epp#active
Domain Status: clientTransferProhibited https://icann.org/epp#clientTransferProhibited
Name Server: dns1.registrar-servers.com
Name Server: dns2.registrar-servers.com
DNSSEC: unsigned
>>> Last update of WHOIS database: 2026-03-19T17:53:53.106Z <<<

62016715
>>62016694
Face.

It can be reconstructed from the data, granted rudimentarily.

62016716
>>62016543
so tired of you ankhnigger shill
its funny how you suddenly pivoted from every ankh being worth $2.7m USD over a lifetime work, because obviously, why would one buy ankh if its given via UBI anyway

so now faggot op pivoted to its a depegged stablecoin thats gonna peg soon, i swear

kys jeetnigger

>>62016620
>>62016626
its fucking fake bullshit https://adal.so/ubi has NO dmarc, and was registered on namecheap, ie a jeet didnt even want to shell out for proper hosting services.

62016725
>>62016715
>global new blockchain will use faces as bioid
anyone with a non roomtemp iq can immediately see how stupid this is.

Will never work, nwo style bioid will ALWAYS come with dna based for storage + gov identification done locally via encrypted enclaves, and *maybe* rna reidentification on yearly/timely manner so stale info attacks cannot be done.

OP, I sincerely hope you get your $1000 bucks from other stupid jeets buying this but no self respected 1st worlder is gonna buy a low level scam like this

62016730
>>62016680
>>62016693
HAHAHAHAHAHA

62016743
>>62016543
You get 3 million OVER YOUR ENTIRE LIFETIME, in return you plunge deeper into goyim cattle nigger slop hell. Sounds like a solid deal brotato.

62016761
>>62016716
>ankh shill
this is the first time I’ve see this mentioned though.

62016769
>>62016543
>>62016543
There’s a few factors here OP is missing based on the actual source code at https://github.com/ankhcash/ankh-chain

The biometrics are hashed after local verification/notary. The main thing is the distribution of tokens under the blockchain and biometric association with wallets and addresses under the protocol.

62016798
>>62016715
For example this is reconstructed from a verification on the blockchain. You can try using the same descriptors and will get a similar face everytime.
https://api.ankh.cash/api/v1/accounts/ankh_afb5da4072921a92db7a4c029e0b589d644a5be8

Or on downloaded node, in data/chain.json

It can be compute intensive, just a heads up. Address alone can be enough to see who owns it.

62016821
>>62016798
Can you share the full descriptor values? Not keen on clicking on any links.

62016832
>>62016821
{
"id": "f8de47b6-d2f1-4021-a222-f46e0fd48a5f",
"type": "BIOMETRIC_REGISTRATION",
"from": "ankh_f585c14699e6a5aaac7ff3a0fdf8427dc88c6fab",

62016897
>>62016554
Remember NFTs? Red Ape Family?

62018112
>>62016769
It’s a good code OP

Well done

62019917
>>62018112
It's not my code.

62019981
>>62019917
lol ok

The descriptor reconstructed the exact same face for me using stylegan. How’d you manage that?

62019985
>>62016543
>Ankh
sorry but this feels like a scam.
Ankh is the Indian word for a “unit” btw. Do what you will with this information

62020086
>>62019985
I highly doubt it is. I've been monitoring it since November 2025. The Ankh in question is referring to the ancient Egyptian ankh per the logo itself - with its own deeply rooted esotericisms.

62020516
>>62020086
you're the creator of the coin you oaf
genesis for a ubi coin, think about that, so fucking stupid. get back to the drawing board, i made better crypto scams when i was a teenager

item.title: WTFWT — 25 replies — 100.0/hr
item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:50 UTC

OP

WTFWT

62020116
Did trump die?

62020117
taco

62020121

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62020138
>>62020112
this volatility is making me C(rypto) sick

62020145
wtf just happened?

62020152
I FINNA BE RICH!!!

62020160
damn son

62020161
What the actual hell just happened?!

62020169
>>62020112
what the fuck is going on

62020171
>>62020161
The bull market started

62020174
i was literally blasting breaking benjamin while slitting my wrists and 5 minutes later im blasting K-Pop while goonin my penis. WGMI

62020184
How the fuck does it pump 4k in 5 mins. This is stop hunting. We are about to have a long and dead war. Trump gave the order to blow up that fucking power plant didnt he?

62020186
>>62020161
https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/116278159912794855
always bet on taco

62020189
Trump postponing attackd

62020192
>>62020186
this fucking clown lmfaoo

62020198
>>62020161

62020201
>>62020186
Ah that explains it. Another pump and dump scheme by sharter in chief

62020215
>>62020112
Wtfwt

62020225
>>62020201

We are lead by a retard

62020249
>>62020112
gongo up

62020252
>>62020225
is that what gave it away for you?

62020258
>>62020174
Accurate representation of my mental states as well

62020368
>>62020198
this guys just a shameless market manipulating fucking faggot. This is unprecented. This nigger will fake a Nuclear countdown with shorts open, close short, open longs, and say Nuclear launch canceled. Fuck donald nigger lover trump

62020499
doubt theres been any actual talks with Iran, this is just orange man backing off from his insane 48 hour threat

62020507
>>62020499

item.title: oil crashing — 12 replies — 48.0/hr

oil crashing

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:57 UTC

OP

panicans BTFO

Early replies (first 3)

62017904
>>62017888

62017909
>>62017904
it's down you 3rd world BRICS shill faggot https://www.investing.com/commodities/crude-oil

62017919
>>62017888
Market manipulation by the faggot Scott Bessent. Wait until tomorrow.

62017945
>>62017888
wow is that real?

62017960
>>62017888
holy shit how did you teach your cat to do that

62017972
>>62017888

My BNO shares are going to continue to head up.

62017984

You have nine days left to cover your short before futures expiry, kike. Tick. Tock.

62017992
>>62017972

62018006
>>62017992

Oh no, my heckin long, how will I ever recover?? Post short, kike. Protip: you can't.

62018022
>>62017888
OMG how did the cat do that?

62020483
>>62018022
Yours doesn't?
Maybe you have a weird cat idk

62020564
>>62017888

item.title: wait, trillions in stablecoins and tokenized assets are coming to ETH... — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
wait, trillions in stablecoins and tokenized assets are coming to ETH...

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:53 UTC

OP

and you're not buying? lmao anon, lmao

Early replies (first 3)

62018055
>>62018036
no, i'm holding, because I'm an idiot

62018059
>>62018036
Price and chart.

62018166
The DAO bull run hasn't even begun. Modern liquidity is dumb and getting scammed by wall street every day. The trillions in liquidity on ethereum will have governance and be able to act in their own interest. Winter mute want to dump Eth to push an agenda or liquidate longs? Instant 100% tariffs on inflow and outflows to binance, Thats the end game of Dapps collective smart, active, liquidity. $60,000.00 ETH EOY, $1000 UNI $10,000 Aave EOY.

item.title: Groyper — 3 replies — 10.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Groyper

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:46 UTC

OP

Been digging through archives on the Groyper meme. Oldfags who were around, drop any extra details or corrections pls.

2015: First known use of the word. February 28, Big Dog Groyper drops the term on /r9k/

2016: First known image. March 25. The smug fat toad with the iconic pose debuts on /v/

2017: An anon /pol/ post mentions Groyper is a toad and friend of Pepe. Later a Wojak version appears, and different Groyper variations spread on Reddit and Twitter as the default smug reaction. That_groyper Twitter account launches and posts exploitables.

Late 2010s–early 2020s. Fully adopted by the Fuentes crowd, becomes mascot for the e-right and later the Groyper Army.

2023. Same toad used for the first memecoin on TON, oldest living Groyper in crypto. Still active and updating in March 2026, longest-running by far.

Other Groypers appear on different chains. ETH, Sol, Base, Pulse etc. ETH version hit 20mil ATH, but it's quiet now. Sol one is the only other that's kinda still alive, but barely.

2025. Financial Times names "Groyper" word of the year. Ties it to ultra-right youth wave. NYT throws it in top phrases and lists too.

2026. The TON original pulled way ahead: active community, TON DeFi superapp groypfi.io Telegram trading bot, perps, AI agent, NFT/Gifts market, Groypad launchpad with biggest creator fees on TON.

From random 4chan post to the headlines to real DeFi tools on Telegram chain. Wild arc.

Anything I missed?

Early replies (first 3)

62020304
How do I profit from this?

62020427
>>62020286
Can someone explain to me the point of TON if telegram introduced stars to oblige the app stores? Been trying to wrap my head around that business decision ever since it came out

62020467
Easter?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-03-23 11:35 UTC

OP

Oil is at $98

This is the cheapest its going to get. If you're thinking of going long on oil, this is your signal. Once we liberate the Iranian power plants, every powerplant, refinery, and desalination plant is going to get blown to hell. World oil supply will be reduced for the next decade at least.

This is your only warning.

https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/116269822349947644

The worse things get for iran the more likely you will see mass desertion in the irgc as soldiers leave to go be with their family.

The people are so jaded that nothing less than a nuke will change the price higher that its recent peak

They can't even organize as the opposition party is also owned by jews.

62019961
>>62019086
The average white man especially in fly over country had objectively better lives in terms of income, upward social mobility, sex lives and even lower suicide rates under every single woke regime both with Obama vs trump's first term and now under Biden than under trump. The real spiteful mutants unironically ended up being MIGA and now they will freely admit to it. They do not care about making anyone's life better, even their own, just sucking everyone into their vortex of misery and spite. Objectively these people deserve to be punished and never be forgiven but they are natural cowards to they will try every dirty trick in the book to slink away from any consequences.

I cashed out literally every other stock I had ~2 weeks ago when WTI dipped down to the low $80s (2x leveraged ETF).This is the surest bet of all time, Iran absolutely can't afford to compromise on this and nothing short of a massive employment of nuclear weapons can open the strait of they don't agree. I'll probably cash out at $120 or $130 but there's still loads of meat on the bone (already up ~40 percent) I'd buy more if I had it.
